cdr_integrity_correction: ANARCI CSV insertion columns must remain in emitted biological order; this run uses sequence-exact unique cdr1_after/cdr2_after/cdr3_after for Docking restraints.
claim_boundary: Independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry teacher launch only; not binding, Kd, IC50, expression, purity, or experimental blocking.
failure_semantics: Monomer technical failures are NA and excluded without replacement; they are not negative Docking labels.
